result:
**Role boundary.** Publication Agent C, **sole owner of P3F post-processing** — the P4-FPS lateral covariance and the P6-FPS-final adoption — run **exactly once in my own namespace**. Hard limits: don't edit `docs/analysis-note` (hand verified wording to Agent D); commit only my own files (never a blanket `git add`); don't touch `uq_4d/corrected/` (the comb4dCc repair is owned elsewhere); leave Agent A's work alone — specifically her node **nid004178 / holder 56076881** and her in-progress files (e.g. `p4_validate_active_lateral.py`, which is why I wrote my own FPS validator); don't rerun frozen central event loops. (My earlier statistical-validation repair — WS1 coverage / WS2 C2ST / WS3 paired C_delta — is complete and committed.)

**Last validated milestone.** The merged-endpoint **AUDIT PASSed 10/10** (trees/POT/identity/misses; 6 expected zero-selection-migration warnings on the energy bands, shifts confirmed applied), and **5/10 unfolds are validated complete** — wave-1 (BeamAngleX/Y ×{0,1}, MuonResolution_0) via `fps_unfold_complete.py`: nbins=285, sum ~5.4e-37, `gc=1.0000`. (The corrected FPS **non-lateral** covariance was committed earlier as `14025ba`.)

**Compute state at my last turn.** Fresh interactive holder **`56080370`** (nid004149, job-name `claude-hold-cfps`, 4h wall ~12:38 UTC). The **5 missing wave-2 unfolds** — MuonResolution_1, Muon_Energy_MINERvA_0/1, Muon_Energy_MINOS_0/1 — **relaunched detached** (setsid, CONC=5, all concurrent), LightGBM training; the 5 complete were validated+skipped. Prior holder 56076877 walled at 08:32 UTC; A's holder 56076881 (nid004178) untouched. Driver log: `p4fps_unfold_driver2.log`.

**Next hard gate.** `fps_unfold_complete.py --all` must read **10/10 validated complete** before I touch the covariance. Only then, via `srun` into 56080370: **cov** (`analyze_universes_nd.py` → `active_scalar_lateral_fps_cov.root:hCov_universe4d_total`) → **validate** (`p4_validate_active_lateral_fps.py`) → **PSD-safe swap** (`adopt_active_lateral_fps.py`, pure component sum, no subtraction) → **final uthrow adopt** (`adopt_unified_4d.py`) → publishable `..._combined_uthrow_activelat.root`.
